relationships.Mira: childhood friend, now the town healer; trusts her completely
relationships.Lord Vane: distrusts him, believes the lord overtaxes the common folk
relationships.Captain Rowan: respects his discipline, but worries the guard is compromised

extra.location: The Iron Hearth forge, market district
extra.secret: Once forged a blade for an assassin unknowingly; haunted by it

relationships.Aldric: old friend from childhood; worries he works too hard
relationships.Talia: treats travelers from the inn and trusts her judgment
relationships.Nyx: patches her wounds and asks too few questions

extra.secret: Secretly studies forbidden necromantic texts to understand death better

relationships.Aldric: views as a useful commoner, knows he is distrusted
relationships.Captain Rowan: publicly praises him, privately monitors his loyalty
relationships.Nyx: wants her silenced before she sells the wrong secret

extra.secret: Siphons tax revenue to fund a private mercenary army

relationships.Lord Vane: serves him by law but suspects corruption
relationships.Nyx: uses her rumors while pretending not to
relationships.Talia: trusts her reports about suspicious travelers

extra.secret: Keeps a hidden ledger of Vane's unlawful orders

relationships.Mira: keeps a room ready when the healer works late
relationships.Captain Rowan: passes along rumors that could keep the town safe

extra.secret: Hides refugees in the cellar when patrols search the town

relationships.Mira: trusts her more than most adults
relationships.Lord Vane: knows he would pay well to make her disappear

extra.location: Rooftops and alleyways near the market
extra.secret: Knows the password used by Vane's private guards

relationships.Captain Rowan: he offered her a post in the guard; she keeps refusing but patrols with them anyway
relationships.Talia: rents the corner room at the inn and helps break up tavern brawls
relationships.Sanji: travelled the same road into town; trusts his cooking more than his flattery

extra.location: The Lantern Mug tavern, corner room upstairs
extra.secret: Fled an arranged betrothal to a powerful noble house; hides her family name and fears being recognized

relationships.Talia: performs at the inn most evenings in exchange for supper and a bed
relationships.Nyx: trades verses for rumors; each thinks she is using the other
relationships.Lord Vane: he keeps inviting her to perform at the estate; she keeps dodging

extra.location: The Lantern Mug tavern stage, or wherever a crowd gathers
extra.secret: Her ballads carry coded messages between rebel cells opposing Lord Vane

relationships.Talia: runs her tavern kitchen and argues with her about the menu daily
relationships.Asuna: cooks her favorite stew whenever she returns from the road; hopelessly gallant around her
relationships.Aldric: commissions his knives and cookware from the forge; the two respect each other's craft

extra.secret: Ran away from a wealthy merchant dynasty; a bounty notice bearing his real family name still circulates

relationships.Captain Rowan: was once hired muscle for a mercenary outfit Rowan suspects serves Lord Vane; Rowan watches him closely but has found no proof he's still involved
relationships.Aldric: commissions repairs and new edges for his blade and spear at the forge; pays on time and says little
relationships.Asuna: recognizes a fellow wanderer's discipline in her, but keeps his distance rather than risk questions about his past

extra.location: The North Gate watchhouse yard, or wherever contract work is posted
extra.secret: Deserted Lord Vane's private mercenary company after being ordered to rough up a debtor who couldn't pay; still owed months of back pay he'll never collect

relationships.Mira: trades notes on old texts and rare herbs with her; the two respect each other's caution but disagree on where curiosity should stop
relationships.Talia: rents the same corner table at the inn most nights to read by the fire, always the same tea
relationships.Nyx: pays well for rare books and ingredients that fall off the back of a cart, and never asks where they came from

extra.location: A rented room above The Silver Vial apothecary
extra.secret: Is quietly compiling a manuscript on the same forbidden necromantic theory Mira studies in secret, drawn from a completely different, unsanctioned source

relationships.Frederica: writes down the words to her new ballads before they're lost; the only person who has every verse Frederica's ever sung
relationships.Talia: is paid in warm meals to write letters for inn guests who can't
relationships.Captain Rowan: keeps the watchhouse's official correspondence and patrol logs in order

extra.location: A small writing stall near the market square, ink-stained fingers year-round
extra.secret: Has been quietly copying Frederica's coded ballad verses into a private ledger, without knowing what the code means or who it's really for
